sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ عَلَى الْعَشَاءِ مَعًا كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je zajedno sjedala na večeru svake večeri.
sentences.translationEn: The family sat together for dinner every evening.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ كُلٌّ مِنْهُمْ يَحْكِي مَا حَدَثَ مَعَهُ الْيَوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Svako od njih bi ispričao šta mu se danas dogodilo.
sentences.translationEn: Each of them would tell what happened to them during the day.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الأَبُ يَسْمَعُ بِاهْتِمَامٍ وَيُعَلِّقُ بِرِفْقٍ.
sentences.translation: Otac bi pažljivo slušao i blago komentarisao.
sentences.translationEn: The father would listen carefully and comment gently.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الأُمُّ تَقُولُ إِنَّ هَذِهِ اللَّحَظَاتِ لَا تُعَوَّضُ.
sentences.translation: Majka bi govorila da se ovakvi trenuci ne mogu nadoknaditi.
sentences.translationEn: The mother would say that these moments are irreplaceable.
